name: custom/ga4-itemid-fix
description: Feedlingo GA4 Product ID Fix for Shopware: replaces Shopware UUID item IDs with real product numbers in storefront ecommerce tracking.

description.de-DE: Ersetzt Shopware UUID-Produkt-IDs in Tracking-Ausgaben durch echte Produktnummern (SKU / productNumber) für GA4 und viele dataLayer-basierte Google-Ads-/Remarketing-Setups. Sicher: keine Änderungen an Produkten, Bestellungen oder Shopdaten. Mehr Infos: www.feedlingo.de
description.en-GB: Replaces Shopware UUID product IDs in tracking output with real product numbers (SKU / productNumber) for GA4 and many dataLayer-based Google Ads / remarketing setups. Safe: does not modify products, orders, or shop data. More info: www.feedlingo.de
